devdoc.details: Smart contract for secure exam paper storage with encryption and time-lock

doesHashExist(string).details: Check if a document hash already exists

getPaper(uint256).details: Get exam paper details by ID

params._paperId: The ID of the paper to retrieve

getTotalPapers().details: Get the total number of papers stored

isExamTimeReached(uint256).details: Check if exam time has arrived (time-lock mechanism)

params._paperId: The ID of the paper to check

returns._0: bool True if exam time has arrived

rescheduleExam(uint256,uint256).details: Reschedule an exam by updating the examDateTime

params._paperId: The ID of the paper to reschedule

storePaper(string,string,string,uint256,.details: Store a new exam paper on the blockchain

params._documentHash: SHA-256 hash of the encrypted document

returns._0: paperId The ID of the stored paper

verifyPaper(uint256).details: Verify a paper (called after successful decryption and validation)

params._paperId: The ID of the paper to verify
